# name: Deploy

# ─── How deployments work ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#
# Both services deploy automatically via their native GitHub integrations —
# no secrets or CLI steps required in this workflow.
#
# SERVER (Vercel Serverless)
#   Trigger:  push to main that touches server/**
#   Config:   server/vercel.json (routes all traffic to src/index.ts via @vercel/node)
#   Runtime:  Node.js serverless function (TypeScript, no compile step needed)
#   Migrations: run manually via `DATABASE_URL=... npx prisma migrate deploy`
#
# CLIENT (Vercel)
#   Trigger:  push to main that touches client/**
#   Config:   client/vercel.json
#   Builder:  Vite (auto-detected, rootDirectory = client)
#   Domain:   https://sunny-tune.vercel.app
#
# This file is kept as documentation. To trigger a manual redeploy:
#   - Vercel (server): dashboard → project → Deployments → Redeploy
#   - Vercel (client): dashboard → project → Deployments → Redeploy

# on:
# workflow_dispatch: # manual trigger only — actual deploys are handled natively
